scripts.develop: concurrently "cd server && npm run watch" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build --mode production
scripts.build:demo: cd client && npm install && npm run build --mode demo
scripts.start:develop: cd server && cross-env NODE_ENV=development nodemon server.js
scripts.start:demo: cd server && cross-env NODE_ENV=demo node server.js
scripts.start:prod: cd server && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node server.js
scripts.install: cd server && npm i && cd ../client && npm i
